title: Photo Mode
description: Adds a photo mode screen to the game, allowing to capture the world from different isometric perspectives.
body:
Adds a photo mode screen to the game, allowing to capture the world from different isometric perspectives. This can be accessed using a button in the pause menu.

![Showcase of the active photo mode screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d87f07e82ddce97d4c88bc993660ef27dfbe4240.jpeg)

The photo mode screen allows for rotation and tilting of the view as well as adjusting the time of day
